titleStmt.title: SII 10.123: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 123. (A.R. No. 40 of 1912.) ON A PILLAR LYING NEAR THE GODOWN IN THE MUNICIPAL MUSEUM AT RAJAHMUNDRY, EAST GODAVARI DISTRICT. Ś. 1071.

summary.p: Mentions that Sōmana, (son of) Datyana-Peggaḍa lord of Oragāṇḍi presented a perpetual lamp to god Vīrabhadrēśvara of Paṭṭisam. Incidentally, it mentions other charities given by the same person in some other sacred places.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakava¨rṣamulu 1071 ṇḍagu nēṁ
ṭi sū¨ryyagrahaṇanimittamuna śrīmanmahā
maṁḍalika boddanakoḍku nārāyaṇadēvani pra
dhāni datyanapeggaḍa sōmana paṭṭisamuna vīrabha
drēśvaramahādēvaraku nakhaṁḍadīpamunaku
niccina mōdālu 55 vīniṁ jēkoni jannebōyiniya
ḍapuna Appana bōyinikoḍku sū¨ryyabōyuṁ
ḍu putrānapauvutrika Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamu nityamā
neṇḍu neyi vōyaṁgalavāṇḍu . bhīmāvuramu ḍāka
rēmiyu namāḍālu guḍipūṁḍi yunuṁ bālu
kolana vīrabhadrēśvaraṁbuna bhāvapaṭṭunaṁ dāṁbra
puriṁ bi puramunaṁ baṁragu(baraṁgu)dūba ghaṁṭaśālā
puriṁ gautaraṁbu nanu nēlīśvaraṁbunanu vēgīśvaramu
na vijayavāṭika nuṁḍavallini vēlupūraṁ garamo
ppa goṁṭūraṁ gaḍilipalli kanakavalayamulunu ghana
lōhavaradaṁḍamulu nakhaṁḍadīpamulunuṁ beṭṭi ma
laṁ bekkuguḍluṁ jeṟuvulu goṁṭṭūra nilipe maṁtri
maṁte ṣubhujuṁḍu . [1 .*] bhāradvājapavitragōtruṁḍu
jagatprakhyātigāṁ beṭṭeṁ buṇyāraṁbhbhuṁḍorigāṁḍi
vallabhuṁḍu dattāmātyasōmuṁḍu dākṣārāmapra
mukhōllasatprakaṭapaṁcārāma tī¨rtthaṁbulanu sārā
khaṁḍadaśā ptadīpakamu lācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbugānu . [2 .*]
Digital edition of SII 10.123 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
